title: GregTech: A Classic makeover
description: This texture pack does not change most models, but only makes the necessary changes to make gregtech look good
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2514fdfcc936cc176320e7e0497afc600aba6199.png)
# 
### Classic style with pleasant changes
Tired of seeing the textures made in a hurry, but don't want to change the visual much? Then this texture pack is for you, this texture pack changes only the details that are unpleasant to the eye, leaving the classic visual of the mod 
# 
### Textures
